title: Learning Assistants Spring 2026 | NYU Shanghai
description: Jointly established by New York University and East China Normal University, NYU Shanghai is the third degree-granting campus in NYU global network, joining NYU Abu Dhabi and NYU New York City.
text:
Learning Assistants Spring 2026
Yufeng XuComputer Science Lead LACSCI-SHU 360: Machine Learning, CSCI-SHU-220 Algorithms
Lanke (Tony) XiaComputer Science LACSCI-SHU 101: Introduction to Computer Science and Data Science, CSCI-SHU 210 Data Structures
Shidong (Steve) XuComputer Science LACSCI-SHU 213: Databases, CSCI-SHU 215 Operating Systems
Zhuoran (Jolia) ChenComputer Science LACSCI-SHU 210 Data Structures, CSCI-SHU 11 Introduction to Computer Programming
Junzhuo (Mandy) LuComputer Science LACSCI-SHU 11 Introduction to Computer Programming, CSCI-SHU 101 Introduction to Computer and Data Science
Danial SagimbayevComputer Science LACSCI-SHU 11 Introduction to Computer Programming, CSCI-SHU 101 Introduction to Computer and Data Science
Mandi(Mandy) QiComputer Science LACSCI-SHU 2314 Discrete Mathematics, CENG-SHU 202 Computer ArchitectureHi! I’m Mandy, a sophomore double majoring in computer science and mathematics. I’m really excited to serve as LA for Computer Architecture and Discrete Mathematics. I enjoy exploring math theory and how they can be applied to computer algorithms. Feel free to come by with any questions. I’m always happy to help clarify concepts and work through the problems together. Outside of academics, I enjoy gaming and musicals. Really looking forward to meeting you all!

Xiangxiang (Adella) HuComputer Science & Math LACENG-SHU 202 Computer Architecture, MATH-SHU 235: Probability and Statistics
Yuhan LiuMath/Computer Science LAMATH-SHU 140 Linear Algebra, CSCI-SHU 360 Machine Learning
